description: ISO-3 country code used for joining to country boundaries.
notes: Harmonise with Natural Earth ADM0_A3 or ISO_A3.
Keep FAOSTAT name; add display_name later if needed.

description: Data year used for hotspot map.
notes: Use latest common year available across variables.

description: Area of organic soils drained for agricultural activities.
notes: Should include cropland and grazed grassland if using FAO drained organic soils definition.

description: CO2 emissions from drained organic soils.
source: FAOSTAT land-use emissions / FAO drained organic soils
notes: If source reports carbon C in Gg, convert to CO2 using 44/12 and document.

description: N2O emissions converted to CO2 equivalent.
source: FAOSTAT emissions agriculture / FAO drained organic soils
notes: Document GWP convention if conversion is needed.

description: Total GHG emissions from drained organic soils.
notes: Core visual metric for hotspot map.

description: Emissions intensity per drained organic soil area.
Rank by total emissions from drained organic soils.

notes: Density may be unstable for very small areas.

description: Total peatland extent from Global Peatland Map 2.0 or other source.
notes: Optional for MVP; raster aggregation can be postponed.

description: Share of peatland area drained for agriculture.
notes: Only compute if peatland_area_km2 and drained area are harmonised.
Example: very_high, high, medium, low, no_data.

description: Short caveat for the country record.
notes: Use for missing data, unstable joins, small denominators, or uncertainty.
